summary: Frontend-only retest of /client-360 after refactoring 1843-line Client360View.jsx into client360/* sub-modules (data.js, utils.js, ClientHeader, OverviewTab, HoldingsTab, PerformanceSection, ContactAdvisorSection). All 13 review checks PASS. Zero behavior regression detected. Page renders, all 14 tabs clickable without crash, Goals tab still renders adviser-goals (iter 187 regression), Holdings has 7 asset-category cards, Performance has recharts surface, Accounts/Transactions/Documents/Communications all populate, Contact tab quick-actions render, Model button navigates to /transaction-modeler, Meeting button enters MeetingMode with exit UI.

design_issues.screen: /client-360 (any tab with embedded charts on inactive Tabs)
issues: Recharts console warnings: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0'. Caused by ResponsiveContainer mounting inside hidden TabsContent for budget/goals/holdings/performance. Non-blocking — charts render correctly when their tab becomes active. Pre-existing pattern, not introduced by this refactor.

critical_code_review_comments: Client360View.jsx (255 lines) is clean composition; tab list is data-driven via TAB_DEFS array which is good DRY.
data.js is 475 lines (large but acceptable for static demo data). Consider lazy-loading per-client data if it grows further.
Recharts ResponsiveContainer warnings on inactive tabs could be suppressed by lazy-mounting heavy tab contents (e.g., render only when tab.value === activeTab) — minor perf win, not a bug.
ContactAdvisorSection inputs are not wrapped in a <form> element. Functionally fine (handled via state), but using a semantic form would help accessibility and keyboard submit.
test_credentials: No auth. localStorage: wealth_command_compliance_v5='permanent', app_mode='adviser', selected_client={id:'client_1'}
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing static demo client data (David & Sarah Thompson).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactor of Client360View into client360/* sub-modules verified — zero regressions across all 14 tabs, header, metrics, Model and Meeting actions. Test setup: navigate to root first, set localStorage (compliance, app_mode=adviser, selected_client), then navigate to /client-360. Backend was not tested per request scope. Recharts width(-1) warnings on inactive tabs are pre-existing and harmless.
rca of the issue: N/A — no issues found. Refactor is behavior-preserving.
